08 of June, 2026

Birmingham, UK

Register your interest

Women in Tech Meetup 2026 — Women in Tech Meetup 2026

A full day in the heart of Birmingham for professionals who care about technology, leadership, and innovation — with speakers, a panel, networking, catering, and space for stalls and demos.

Join a community shaping one of the most important conversations in our industry. Register your interest and we’ll let you know when tickets and updates go live.

Register your interest
When
8 June 2026
Time
9:30am–3:30pm
Venue
Millennium Point
City
Birmingham

Speakers

One day of talks and panels — meet the voices taking the stage at Women in Tech Meetup 2026.

Schedule

A single packed day focused on tech, leadership, and community — at Women in Tech Meetup 2026.

8 June 2026

One day at Millennium Point — sessions, a panel, breaks, and time to connect. Final timings and titles will be confirmed closer to the event.

  1. Registration & refreshments

    Tea, coffee, and meet the community

    9:30am – 10:00am · UK

  2. Welcome

    10:00am – 10:30am · UK

  3. Morning sessions

    Talks from invited speakers (agenda to follow)

    10:30am – 12:00pm · UK

  4. Lunch

    12:00pm – 1:00pm · UK

  5. Afternoon sessions

    Further talks and stories from the industry

    1:00pm – 2:30pm · UK

  6. Panel discussion

    Q&A with guests (topics to be announced)

    2:30pm – 3:15pm · UK

  7. Closing remarks & networking

    3:15pm – 3:30pm · UK

Current sponsorships for our workshops and speakers.
